caption: In a large, formal ballroom featuring an ornate ceiling with multiple crystal chandeliers, several people are performing on a wide, blue-carpeted stage. A crowd of people is seated at round tables in the background. One performer wears a black sleeveless top and blue trousers, another wears a tan outfit, and a third is dressed in white. As the sequence progresses, the performers move across the stage in a coordinated fashion. The individual in black and the person in tan move towards the right side of the stage, while the person in white transitions from the left toward the center. The performers' postures and movements suggest a dance or choreographed routine. The lighting is warm, and the edges of the stage are draped with red fabric. No on-screen text or logos are visible throughout the scene.
